new_javadoc:
/** * Fills and returns the given array, assigning {@code '\0'} to each element of the array. *

* Equivalent to: *

* 
     * ArrayFill.fill(a, fromIndex, toIndex, '\0'); // and not '0'!
     *
* * @param a the array to fill (may be null). * @param fromIndex the index of the first element (inclusive) to be filled with {@code '\0'}. * @param toIndex the index of the last element (exclusive) to be filled with {@code '\0'}. * @return the given array. * @see Arrays#fill(char[], int, int, char) * @since 3.21.0 */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java @@ -0,0 +65,22 @@ + return fill(a, CharUtils.NUL); // and not '0'! + } + + /** + * Fills and returns the given array, assigning {@code '\0'} to each element of the array. + *

+ * Equivalent to: + *

+ * 
+     * ArrayFill.fill(a, fromIndex, toIndex, '\0'); // and not '0'!
+     *
+ * + * @param a the array to fill (may be null). + * @param fromIndex the index of the first element (inclusive) to be filled with {@code '\0'}. + * @param toIndex the index of the last element (exclusive) to be filled with {@code '\0'}. + * @return the given array. + * @see Arrays#fill(char[], int, int, char) + * @since 3.21.0 + */ + public static char[] clear(char[] a, int fromIndex, int toIndex) { + return fill(a, fromIndex, toIndex, CharUtils.NUL); + }
commit_message:
StrBuilder.setLength(int) shrink-branch leaves residual chars in buffer tail (#1671)

* Add ArrayFill.clear(char[], int, int)
* Add ArrayFill.fill(char[], int, int, char)

* StrBuilder.setLength(int) shrink-branch leaves residual chars in buffer
tail
